form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 47 days. Last outing finished second of 16 runners at this track on February 26 over 3922m, on a wet track; 9 len behind Kiely's Place carrying 71.5kg at $1.80. Before that finished second of 16 starters at Naas on January 25 over 3721m, on heavy track; 4.5 len behind Shuttle Diplomacy carrying 75.5kg at $3. Can return to winning form.
